acceptance.note: PN248 acceptance distribution not recorded for K=3 chat artifact creation bench (greedy-decode workloads have implicit ~100% target-track acceptance). Operator may collect a PN248 sample later via SNDR_ENABLE_SPEC_DECODE_ACCEPTANCE_METRIC=1 and refresh this block; the workload-class TPS measurements below are the load-bearing evidence for the decision.

notes: K=3 chat-role bench 2026-05-31 on pin 0.21.1rc1.dev354+g626fa9bba. Mirror-sibling of gemma4-31b-tq-mtp-structured-k4: where K=4 is +24% structured / -51% free-form / -14.7% global, K=3 is the opposite trade-off: +105.7% free-form / -18.3% structured / +19% global. Global delta 19% exceeds promotion_gain_threshold 0.1 → validated_conditional eligible. Allowed workloads are the K=4 artifact's denied set (free_chat, code_gen, summarization); denied workloads are the K=4 artifact's allowed set (structured_count, tool_json) so the two profiles partition cleanly at the request_router boundary.
